title: Wire plexus.evaluation.info to Evaluation.get_evaluation_info directly
description: Replace the current MCP-loopback implementation of plexus.evaluation.info inside PlexusRuntimeModule with a direct call to Evaluation.get_evaluation_info / Evaluation.get_latest_evaluation. Replicate the include_examples GraphQL slice currently inlined in MCP/tools/evaluation/evaluations.py inside a small helper. Add focused tests with an injectable service. Remove the MCP-backed path with no fallback.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Wired plexus.evaluation.info directly in execute_tactus: moved it from MCP_TOOL_MAP to DIRECT_HANDLERS, added _default_evaluation_info backed by Evaluation.get_evaluation_info/get_latest_evaluation, threaded evaluation_info injection through PlexusRuntimeModule/_run_tactus_sync/_execute_tactus_tool, and added focused tests for routing, validation, budget accounting, catalog listing, and end-to-end Tactus execution. Tests: python -m pytest MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute_test.py -q (49 passed); python -m pytest spikes/runtime-mcp-validation MCP/tools/tactus_runtime -q (86 passed). Follow-up filed for include_examples direct helper.
